name: Francis Schaeffer
title: Philosopher, Theologian & Author
bio: American evangelical theologian, philosopher, and Presbyterian pastor. He founded the L'Abri Fellowship community in Switzerland, which became a haven for seekers and intellectuals exploring Christian faith. He authored influential works including 'The God Who Is There' and 'How Should We Then Live?'
faith: Schaeffer engaged the intellectual culture of the 20th century with a rigorous Christian worldview. He argued that Christianity provides the only adequate basis for human meaning, morality, and knowledge. His work influenced a generation of evangelical thinkers and leaders.

videos.title: How Should We Then Live? — Francis Schaeffer Documentary Series
videos.note: Schaeffer's landmark documentary series on Western civilization and Christianity
